productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men CR WB PS White Jacket
description: Composition White and blue striped and panelled hooded jacket with the shell made of 100% polyester, has long sleeves with the adidas patented Triple-Stripes, a mock collar, printed branding on the left chest, zippered front placket with branded zipper and two pockets on the front with zippered closures Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash No bleaching, dry cleaning or ironing Combining sport and style is adidas' forte. This jacket beats the monsoon rain with an individualistic look. Wear this to any outdoorsy event to look your best. Pair this tee with a subtly hued tee, classic denims and sports shoes to snazz up your style. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
